title: bursaria spinosa subsp. spinosa
intro: Bursaria spinosa subsp. spinosa, also known as the blackthorn or native blackthorn, is a native Australian plant belonging to the family Myrtaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Bursaria spinosa subsp. spinosa include relief from sore throats, digestive issues, and skin problems. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to leverage its medicinal properties.
